name: handover_pass_thread_control
description: Pass thread control to another app in the Handover Protocol, enabling seamless bot-to-human handoff.

parameters.name: recipient_id
parameters.description: The PSID of the user whose thread control to pass.

parameters.name: target_app_id
parameters.description: The app ID to pass control to. Use 263902037430900 for Page Inbox.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Optional metadata string to pass to the target app.
parameters.example: Passing to human agent for billing issue

body.metadata: Passing to human agent for billing issue
